news-global-econ.title: Iran War Sent Consumer Sentiment Plunging to Record Low
news-global-econ.description:
Consumer sentiment plunged in early April to the lowest level in the survey's seven-decade history, as the Iran conflict weighed heavily on Republican household views of the economy.

news-global-econ.title: 'Euphoria' star Sydney Sweeney gets major James Bond endorsement from top Hollywood director
news-global-econ.description: Sydney Sweeney's rumored link to the James Bond franchise could redefine her career, with experts saying 007 would benefit from her star power too.

news-global-econ.title: Atlanta's 'Hollywood of the South' Vanishes as Film Production Plummets, Move to UK
news-global-econ.description:
After hitting a peak of $4.4 billion in 2022, spending on film and TV production in Georgia has tumbled, reaching just $2.3 billion in the last fiscal year, as total productions dropped from 412 in 2022 to 245 last year.

news-global-econ.title: 'Fed Up': UK's Starmer Equates Trump and Putin in National Security Rant
news-global-econ.description:
The UK has surrendered ability to ensure its own security, leaving it at the mercy of global events, and the PM raging about energy costs.

news-global-econ.title: AMB GORDON SONDLAND: NATO blinked on Iran, and Trump has every right to be furious
news-global-econ.description: A former U.S. ambassador to the EU argues NATO's hesitation after strikes on Iran emboldens adversaries and erodes the credibility of Western deterrence.

news-global-soc.title: Navy scraps Biden-era submarine contract as overhaul costs surge toward $3B
news-global-soc.description: The Navy is canceling the troubled USS Boise submarine overhaul after costs neared $3 billion, redirecting resources to newer Virginia-class submarines.

news-global-soc.title: Lowe's $250M bet on blue-collar jobs that AI can't do
news-global-soc.description: Lowe's CEO warns AI can't climb a ladder as the company makes a $250 million bet on blue-collar work amid rapid artificial intelligence advancement.

news-global-soc.title: Bruce Springsteen blasts rich men in America as critics call out his billions
news-global-soc.description: Bruce Springsteen sparks controversy with a fiery anti-Trump speech, but critics point out his reported $1.2 billion net worth undercuts his message.
